name: GridPaginationApi
description: The pagination API interface that is available in the grid `apiRef`.

properties.name: setPage
properties.description: Sets the displayed page to the value given by `page`.

properties.name: setPageSize
properties.description: Sets the number of displayed rows to the value given by `pageSize`.

properties.name: setPaginationMeta
properties.description: Sets the `paginationMeta` to a new value.

properties.name: setPaginationModel
properties.description: Sets the `paginationModel` to a new value.

properties.name: setRowCount
properties.description: Sets the `rowCount` to a new value.
